# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdConfig
metadata:
  name: config
spec:
  identity:
    issuer:
      kind: SelfSigned
    trustDomain: cluster.local
  proxy:
    image: docker.io/linkerd/proxy:v2.14.0
  profile: linkerd-destination

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: example-server-policy
spec:
  serverSelector:
    sourceNamespace: default
    kind: "Kubernetes"
    appLabel: "example-app"
  authorizationPolicies:
    - action: PERMIT
      peerSelector:
        namespace: default
        principalRegex: "[a-z0-9]([-.]?[a-z0-9])*"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yml: |
    debug: true
